headline: Is Lennox International (LII) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Lennox International's current share price reflects its real worth, or if the market is missing something important about this stock's value? The shares last closed at US$487.11, with returns of 4.1% over 30 days but an 11.3% decline over the past year. This can hint at shifting expectations around both growth potential and risk. Recent coverage around Lennox International has focused on its role in capital goods and HVAC solutions. This keeps investor attention on how it is...
